Interface IuBasicAuthCredentials

All Superinterfaces:
edu.iu.auth.IuApiCredentials, edu.iu.auth.IuPrincipalIdentity, Principal
public interface IuBasicAuthCredentials extends edu.iu.auth.IuApiCredentials
Provides client-side support for the use of HTTP Basic authentication as API credentials.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    applyTo(HttpRequest.Builder httpRequestBuilder)
     
    String
    getPassword()
    Returns the password to be used for HTTP Basic authentication.
    String
    getUsername()
    Returns the username to be used for HTTP Basic authentication.

    Methods inherited from interface edu.iu.auth.IuPrincipalIdentity

    getAuthTime, getExpires, getIssuedAt, getIssuer, getSubject, implies

    equals, getName, hashCode, toString
